init_eqs_str: a['q1'] = 0; a['bass_effect'] = 0; a['treb_effect'] = 0; a['mid_effect'] = 0; a['ok_to_change'] = 0; a['beat_time'] = 0; a['effect'] = 0;
frame_eqs_str: a['warp']=0; a['bass_effect']=Math.min(Math.max((Math.max(a['bass'], a['bass_att'])-1.3), 0), 1); a['treb_effect']=Math.min(Math.max((Math.max(a['treb'], a['treb_att'])-1.3), 0), 1); a['mid_effect']=Math.min(Math.max((Math.max(a['mid'], a['mid_att'])-1.3), 0), 1); a['wave_r']=(a['wave_r']+(0.45*((0.6*Math.sin((1.517*a['time'])))+(0.4*a['mid_effect'])))); a['wave_b']=(a['wave_b']+(0.45*((0.6*Math.sin((1.088*a['time'])))+(0.4*a['bass_effect'])))); a['wave_g']=(a['wave_g']+(0.45*((0.6*Math.sin((1.037*a['time'])))+(0.4*a['treb_effect'])))); a['zoom']=(a['zoom']+(0.013*((0.60*Math.sin((0.339*a['time'])))+(0.40*Math.sin((0.276*a['time'])))))); a['rot']=(a['rot']+(0.020*((0.60*Math.sin((0.381*a['time'])))+(0.40*Math.sin((0.579*a['time'])))))); a['decay']=(a['decay']-(0.01*below(mod(a['frame'],5), 1))); a['ok_to_change']=((Math.abs(above(a['time'], (a['beat_time']+6)))>0.00001)?(1):(0)); a['bass_effect']=(Math.max(a['bass'], a['bass_att'])-1); a['beat_time']=((Math.abs(above(a['bass_effect'], 0.5))>0.00001)?(((Math.abs(a['ok_to_change'])>0.00001)?(a['time']):(a['beat_time']))):(a['beat_time'])); a['effect']=((Math.abs(equal(a['time'], a['beat_time']))>0.00001)?(((a['effect']+Math.floor(randint(5)))+1)):(a['effect'])); a['effect']=((Math.abs(above(a['effect'], 5))>0.00001)?((a['effect']-6)):(a['effect'])); a['q1']=(a['effect']+2); a['monitor']=a['q1'];
